stemHtml: Which statement about the auto-brake and anti-skid system is correct?

options.a: The auto-brake system prevents yaw movements due to asymmetric braking.
options.b: The auto-brake system can not operate without a properly operating anti-skid system.
options.c: The anti-skid system prevents yaw movements due to asymmetric braking.
options.d: The anti-skid system can not operate without a properly operating auto-brake system.
